data.content: Plan recorded: add workflow-defined per-step metadata for owner, artifact/output expectations, and reviewer guidance; resolve current and next step metadata in runtime; surface it in KnotView, claim/show output, and knot head logs; keep bundle compatibility through defaults; test across compatibility, custom-bundle, and review-heavy workflow patterns. Existing blockers `knots-5464` and `knots-3239` already cover upstream output-target and delivery-semantics dependencies, so no new child knots were created in this planning step.
